<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please fill in the sections below.
If your PR closes an existing issue, write "Closes #123" in the
description.
-->

## What changes

One or two sentences: what does this PR do?

## Why

Which problem does it solve, or which gap does it close?

## How to test

- [ ] `pytest -q` runs green
- [ ] Manual smoke test: ...
- [ ] New tests added (if a new code path)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing style (ruff-compliant)
- [ ] Docs updated (`docs/*.md`, README, or subcommand help)
- [ ] Tests are green on macOS and Linux (CI checks automatically)
- [ ] No PII (real names, phone numbers, emails) in the diff
- [ ] If a DB schema change: migration included

## Breaking changes (if any)

What breaks for existing users?
